top_signals.title: 30-Year Yield Rises as Bond Selloff Deepens
top_signals.summary: Yields on the US Treasury’s longest-dated bond rose to the highest level in almost two decades as investor concerns mount that accelerating inflation will force central bankers to raise interest rates. Bloomberg's Mark Cranfield breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
